findings.message: Updated all 62 Stage 1 audio targets from OGG placeholders to WAV files selected in audio_selection_manifest.json.
Deleted the previous 62 target OGG placeholder files and their 62 OGG meta files from target audio folders.
Left the original Gamemaster Audio - Pro Sound Collection source archive unchanged.
Unity MCP tools were not callable, so Unity-native import validation was not performed.

blocked_reason: Unity-native import checks require callable Unity MCP tools or a separately approved Unity validation tooling unit.
